source_pr.title: *: support read and write operations for the global temporary table
source_pr.body:
### What problem does this PR solve?

Problem Summary:

### What is changed and how it works?

Proposal: [temporary table](https://github.com/pingcap/tidb/pull/24168)

What's Changed:

How it Works:

Support read and write operations for the global temporary table is quite simple.
Just discard the key-value belong to the temporary table before commit.


### Check List <!--REMOVE the items that are not applicable-->

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

- Unit test

### Release note <!-- bugfixes or new feature need a release note -->

- No release note
